creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text:
When connecting and disconnecting the AC power from my laptop, the following message pops up in /var/log/messages and on console:


Aug 25 20:53:03 DRIES-NB kernel: Firmware Error (ACPI): Could not resolve symbol [\_SB.PCI0.RP09.PEGP.NVDN], AE_NOT_FOUND (20200717/psargs-503)
Aug 25 20:53:03 DRIES-NB kernel: ACPI Error: Aborting method \_SB.PCI0.LPCB.EC._Q26 due to previous error (AE_NOT_FOUND) (20200717/psparse-689)

My laptop is a Lenovo T490 running FreeBSD head.
